meaning: adj.生有羽毛的,柔软如羽毛的
examples: The foliage was soft and feathery.
Feathery friends rule. Just ask J.
Ripples of light green liquor soon began to emerge from the thin, feathery leaf.
Growing underground, it is prone to infestation by the feathery mottle virus and worms.
Tiny ice granules build up, growing into feathery white forms known as rime.
